docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE (TRANSACTION ID # 79076453) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIRST NATIONAL BANK OF OMAHA

APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIRST NATIONAL BANK OF OMAHA AS TO DEFENDANT HARDING, LARRY A JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED ($.00 ON INTEREST, $.00 ON PRINCIPAL), $516.36 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIRST NATIONAL BANK OF OMAHA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FIRST NATIONAL BANK OF OMAHA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HARDING, LARRY A $3,425.83 PRINCIPAL, $516.36 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,167.19, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
